notes: Had trouble on initial testing: graphics weren't rendering correctly and couldn't access menu, but coincidentally Antergos offered me a new version of Steam and when I updated and started it again there was a quick, tiny update to the game itself that meant it now works completely flawlessly. I've put Platinum because I didn't need to apply any further tweaks other then letting Steam update.
title: Annwn: the Otherworld

notes: Works perfectly! I ran into one bug where the animation of the menu sliding out of the way to begin a level started looping, but it hasn't recurred after restarting the game.
title: Annwn: the Otherworld
